body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **management SDK migration tracking issue** for migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkFunction` from Swagger/AutoRest to the new TypeSpec-based Azure Management Generator (MPG). It is a sub-issue of the parent migration tracking issue [#53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

<details>
<summary>📦 Current SDK State</summary>

- **SDK Path**: `sdk/networkfunction/Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkFunction/`
- **Current version**: `1.0.0-beta.5` (still in beta — breaking changes more acceptable)
- **Current codegen**: AutoRest (`autorest.md` present, no `tsp-location.yaml`)
- **Main resources**:
  - `AzureTrafficCollectorResource` / `AzureTrafficCollectorCollection`
  - `CollectorPolicyResource` / `CollectorPolicyCollection`
- **No CODEOWNERS entry** for this service directory

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Locate the TypeSpec spec for NetworkFunction in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs) (look under `specification/networkfunction/`)
- [ ] Create `tsp-location.yaml` in the SDK directory pointing to the TypeSpec spec
- [ ] Run generation using the new Azure Management Generator (`/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt`)
- [ ] Resolve any breaking changes vs. current public API surface (check `api/` directory)
- [ ] Add customizations in `Customizations/` folder if needed (e.g., `@@clientName`, `hierarchyBuilding`, `CodeGenSuppress`)
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with migration notes
- [ ] Run pre-commit validation: `dotnet format`, `Export-API.ps1`, `Update-Snippets.ps1`
- [ ] Validate build and tests pass

</details>

<details>
<summary>🛠️ Debugging & Resources</summary>

**Useful commands:**
```powershell
# Install mgmt emitter deps
cd eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt && npm install

# Regenerate after tsp-location.yaml is set up
# (use local generation script for debugging)
pwsh eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/eng/scripts/Generate.ps1

# Export public API after regeneration
pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 networkfunction

# Build and test
dotnet build sdk/networkfunction/Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkFunction.sln
dotnet test sdk/networkfunction/Azure.ResourceManager.NetworkFunction.sln --filter TestCategory!=Live
```

**Key docs & references:**
- [MPG Migration skill](.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/)
- [Mitigating breaking changes skill](.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/)
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed migrations tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)

**Common issues to watch for:**
- Sync methods missing `using DiagnosticScope scope = ...` (known generator bug)
- `@@clientName` on union types can produce broken `global::` references in ModelFactory — use `CodeGenSuppress` + custom method
- `enable-wire-path-attribute: true` may be needed in `tspconfig.yaml` if existing public API relied on `WirePathAttribute`

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Notes</summary>

- Since the SDK is still in beta (`1.0.0-beta.5`), API-level breaking changes are acceptable per Azure SDK versioning policy, reducing customization burden
- No CODEOWNERS entry found for `sdk/networkfunction/` — the team may want to add one
- The `needs-team-triage` label was added since no assignee or Service Attention is set

</details>
